cleavage agent: with 1 μL of 2 mg/mL lysil endoproteinase Lys-C stock solution
collision energy: MS2 analysis used collision-induced dissociation (CID, CE = 35)
enrichment method: purified using cobalt, Co2+, immobilized metal affinity chromatography (IMAC)
fragmentation method: MS2 analysis used collision-induced dissociation (CID, CE = 35)
instrument: using an Orbitrap Lumos mass spectrometer
